content.en:
Ye Tian continued to comprehend this blood tissue, while other replica bodies were also cultivating in retreat, such as the Enlightenment Naxing Zhang Baotu, which was helpful for cultivating at the level of the Realm Legendary Lord.

The years that followed were peaceful, and nothing major happened.

Ye Tian had been practicing in retreat like this, and there were many more Immortal Realm Lords in the space-time territory, but such a small matter could no longer attract Ye Tian's attention.

100,000 eternal years!

500,000 eternal years!

A million eternal years!

Ten million eternal years!

For such a long time, the creatures in the space-time territory of the Source Sea have changed batch after batch, and only those eternal realms exist forever.

And although many creatures in the source sea have an eternal lifespan, the number of people will break out, and there will still be all kinds of wars and killings, like a catastrophe~.

And Ye Tian didn't stop it, everything followed the self-development of Yuanhai

However, the Terran has grown stronger and stronger, and the footsteps of the Terran have traveled all over the Source Sea, and even appeared in countless planes in the space-time territory.

......

"It's been ten million eternal years, and my cultivation has improved a lot. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Now, his Will Rule Realm is much stronger than in the past, and he is not much worse than the extreme of the Will Rule Realm.

Moreover, his will had also improved a lot in these eternal years, which was equivalent to reaching the late stage of the fifth-order will.

On the Eternal Dao, Ye Tian's progress was also incomparably great.

He comprehended the ten eternal paths, all of which had been raised to the state of perfection, all in order to strengthen his foundation.

In addition, his Grey Mist Eternal Dao has also been raised to the realm of perfection in recent days.

Now, although Ye Tian has not reached the realm of transcendent realm legendary lords, his real strength is not weaker than that of some powerful transcendent realm legendary lords.

"When I step into the extreme of the Realm Legendary Lord, I will have to start attacking the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

And the True Void Holy Land also provides two opportunities for the Realm Realm Legendary Lords, one for the Will Rule Realm and one for the Eternals, but these two opportunities are only a little more probable, and it is impossible to completely guarantee the success rate of the breakthrough.

But if it were an ordinary force, there would be no such opportunity.

Ye Tian originally wanted to quietly cultivate to the extreme of the Realm Realm Legendary Lord, and then rely on the opportunity given by the True Saintless Land to impact the Transcendence Realm Legendary Lord, no matter whether he could break through successfully or not, he had to try.

However, on this day, a piece of news came to Ye Tian's ears, which made him a little interested.

A special creature has appeared in the Purple Aurora Light Domain.

The Purple Aurora Domain and the Dark Barrier are the two major obstacles on the path from the Source Sea to the Infinite Sea, and the Purple Aurora Domain is only difficult for people to hurry and identify the direction, there is almost no danger, and there has never been any fancy

But this time, a Decadent Realm Lord of the Source Sea was born in the Purple Aurora Light Domain, and a clone was killed by a special purple creature.

If it's just one time, it may be that other creatures have broken into the Purple Pole Domain, which is just a coincidence.

But then, a legendary lord also encountered that special purple creature in the Purple Aurora Light Domain, and was also killed by the other party in seconds.

Now, the Purple Aurora Light Domain has attracted the attention of many Legendary Lords, and even the Infinite Sea has come to many Legendary Lords, including many Realm Legendary Lords.

......

Within the Union of Lieges.

Many Immortal Realm Lords and Legendary Lords were here, and Ye Tian also came, and sat at the top.

"What's going on with the Purple Aurora Domain lately?

Ye Tian asked.

At this time, Lord Binghan said: "Some special purple creatures have appeared in the Purple Aurora Light Domain, and there are special races that may soon migrate from other regions, their intelligence is not very high, but their strength is very strong, and more importantly, they have extremely powerful time abilities, which are difficult for even our Legendary Lords to compete with their time abilities." For example, this creature has the ability to stop time, and one of my previous clones encountered a purple creature, which was directly frozen in time, and then killed.

"The doppelganger of Lord Ice was also killed?

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

The Lord of Ice Han is now the Lord of the Initial Realm, and his strength is not weak, and he can't even compete with the opponent's time ability, and he is directly frozen by time, which shows that the strength gap between the two sides is very large.

"The wisdom is not high, and the time ability is terrifying!

At this time, Ye Tian thought of a possibility-

Talent!

That kind of purple creature is afraid that it has a time talent, and the level of time talent is very high, and the weakest is also a time talent at the level of a legendary ancestor, otherwise it would not be possible to have such power.

The time talent of the Legendary Ancestral Endowment level, coupled with the strength of the purple creature itself, comparable to that of the Perfection Realm Legendary Lord or the Realm Realm Legendary Lord, can instantly freeze the time where the Ice Letter Lord is.

"If it's really a time talent at the level of Legendary Ancestral Endowment, it will help me too much!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

If he copied a large number of Legendary Ancestor-level Time Talents, wouldn't he have a chance to fuse into Legendary-level Time Ancestors.

this day.

Ye Tian sent a replica body to the Purple Aurora Domain.

Ye Tian's speed was very fast, and it didn't take long for him to come to the Purple Aurora Light Domain.

......

In the void area, a purple area formed a sky, and there was the Purple Aurora Domain, a seemingly endless territory.

Wow!

Ye Tian entered the Purple Aurora Domain, and immediately felt the strong pressure and the erosion of power, only the Eternal Realm Lord above the Immortal Realm could move freely here, and once the slightly weaker Immortal Realm entered here, it was like an ordinary person.

.......... ，

For many creatures, this is undoubtedly a true Jedi.

And as far as the eye can see, everything around is a purple light field, there is nothing, and there are no resources

Swish!

Ye Tian cast the Void Step and kept shuttling here, while copying the area around the area covered by the talent, probing the purple creature.

Time passed slowly, and during this time, Ye Tian had detected other legendary lords, but he did not negotiate with the other party, but staggered.

After a long time, Ye Tian finally sensed the existence of a lack of special creatures.

Race: Purple Auroramon

Cultivation talent: Eternal level

Strength: Immortal Ancestral Endowment

Speed: Immortal Ancestral Endowment

Defense: Immortal Ancestral Endowment

Time: Legendary Zufu

......

"It's really a time talent to pass on the ancestral level!"

Ye Tian immediately copied the other party's time talent.

Soon, the Legend of Time Ancestral Fu was successfully copied.

"Judging from the aura of this Purple Aurora Beast, it should be equivalent to a top-notch Perfection Realm Legendary Lord, and the Initial Realm Legendary Lord is indeed far from being an opponent. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

He didn't kill this purple aurora beast, but silently stalker, gathering his aura with all his might, and tracking the other party with his copy talent.

He wanted to find other Purple Aurora Beasts through this Purple Aurora Beast, so that he didn't need to slowly search for Nine by himself. _
